description_long: This is a large, rectangular residential house surrounded by a tall, dense green hedge forming a square enclosure. The house itself features a symmetrical facade with a central entryway, flanked by evenly spaced windows and a dark, gable-style roof. The property is landscaped with palm trees and a few flowering shrubs, giving it a lush, suburban feel. The hedge acts as a privacy barrier, enclosing the entire property and creating a secluded atmosphere. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level visible above the hedge line. The overall design is reminiscent of a modern Colonial style, with clean lines and a balanced window arrangement.
description: A two-story, symmetrical house with a dark gable roof, surrounded by a tall, dense green hedge and landscaped with palm trees. The property is enclosed, creating a private, suburban setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, and the tall hedge enclosure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hedge's thickness and the palm trees within the enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view of the house, with the back facade and more landscaping visible inside the hedge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the hedge, some flowering shrubs, and the house's side profile.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a covered porch, double doors, and decorative columns.
